zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Clarell Sr.於1364年出生在英國越可爾阿爾德瓦可時，他的父親William Clarell25歲，母親Elizabeth de Reygate17歲。他於1392年與Matilda Montgomery在英國英格蘭越可爾加福索普結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1442年5月1日在英國英格蘭越可爾多卡斯特享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾迪可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Clarell Sr.于1364年出生在英国越可爾阿爾德瓦可时，他的父亲William Clarell25岁，母亲Elizabeth de Reygate17岁。他于1392年与Matilda Montgomery在英国英格兰越可爾加福索普结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1442年5月1日在英国英格兰越可爾多卡斯特享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾迪可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Clarell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan: from clavell ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.

variants.name: Clavel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alfredo, Angel, Bernardina, Carlos, Consuelo, Fernando, Gustavo, Jeronimo, Jorge, Luis, Margarita.  French Andre, Eugenie, Fernande, Jean-Claude, Pierre.
Spanish: from clavel ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.
French: from Old French clavel ‘bolt (of a door or gate)’ or ‘nail, link, ring (of chain mail)’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller. Compare Clewell .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Clarell Sr. was born in 1364, in Aldwark, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Clarell, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth de Reygate, was 17. He married Matilda Montgomery in 1392, in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 1 May 1442, in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Clarell Sr. est né en 1364, à Aldwark, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Clarell, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Reygate, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Montgomery en 1392, à Gawthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1442, à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Tickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Aldwark, Yorkshire, England: Aldwark, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Clarell Sr. 1364 in Aldwark, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Clarell 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Reygate 17. Er hat 1392 in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda Montgomery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Mai 1442 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Matilda Montgomery nel 1392, nel Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 maggio 1442, nel Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Clarell Sr.が1364年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルドワークで生まれた時，父William Clarellは25歳，母Elizabeth de Reygateは17歳であった。1392年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアガウソルペでMatilda Montgomeryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1442年5月1日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスターで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアティックヒルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Clarell Sr.(이)가 1364년 영국 요르크실르 알드워크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Clarell(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Reygate(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 가w소에서 Matilda Montgomery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1442년 5월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 돈카스터에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 티크힐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Clarell Sr. nasceu em 1364, em Aldwark, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Clarell, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Reygate, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Montgomery em 1392, em Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de maio de 1442, em Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Clarell Sr. родился в 1364 г. в местности алдварк, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Clarell было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Reygate, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Montgomery в 1392 г. в местности гавтаурп, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 1 мая 1442 г. в местности донкастир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности тиккхилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Matilda Montgomery en 1392, en Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1442, en Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
